basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website of CSIR NEERI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B. Tech. in Chemical Engineering OR M.Sc. in Chemistry/Environmental Science
qualification.details: Project Associate-I (PAT-I): B.E./ B. Tech. in Chemical Engineering OR M.Sc. in Chemistry/Environmental Science from a recognized university. Experience, where required, will be counted from the date after acquiring minimum educational qualification. Dissertation/ Thesis work done during academic period will not be counted as experience. Time spent in acquiring higher qualification will not be counted as an experience over essential qualification.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA for those candidates who have qualified CSIR-UGC / ICAR / ICMR NET lectureship / Assistant professorship or GATE. Rs. 25,000/- + HRA for others who do not fall under the above category.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment is 02 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E./ B. Tech. in Chemical Engineering OR an M.Sc. in Chemistry/Environmental Science from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 31,000/- + HRA for candidates who have qualified NET/GATE, and Rs. 25,000/- + HRA for others.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on an online interview conducted through platforms like MS Team or Skype.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate-I post at CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment for research purposes at CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR NEERI located?
faq.answer: CSIR NEERI is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440020.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications must be submitted strictly online through the official CSIR NEERI website.
